game: 삼국지 11 (Romance of the Three Kingdoms XI)

stats.growth: Officers have age-dependent ability changes. Peak timing varies: some at 25, others at 40-50
stats.action_point_regen: Based on number of directly controlled cities

duel_system.name: 일기토
duel_system.description: Officers can engage in one-on-one combat. Victory conditions include troop capture.

support_attacks.trigger: Adjacent allied units with trust/compatibility bonuses

relationship_system.description: Fixed affinity/hatred relationships affect recruitment, support attacks, morale

overpowered.name: 신산(Divine Potency)
overpowered.effect: All schemes critical hit + guaranteed success vs lower INT

overpowered.name: 비장(Flying General)
overpowered.effect: Ignores ZOC, guaranteed crit vs lower WAR

overpowered.name: 신장(God's Command)
overpowered.effect: All normal/tactic attacks crit vs lower WAR

overpowered.name: 허실(Agile Mind)
overpowered.effect: All schemes guaranteed success vs lower INT

special_abilities_highlight.balance: Highly unbalanced - ranging from game-breaking OP to seemingly useless
